node.statement: STAGE 3 (Quantum): An initial state v_c with constant overlap |<v_c|v_f>| = Omega(1) with the true eigenstate can be prepared using poly(log(1/h_f)) gates and classical operations, by solving the coarse-grid problem classically and interpolating onto the fine grid. [Paper Section 8.1, Theorem 14, Appendix B]
